titleStmt.title: SII 28.27: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 27. (A.R. No. 27 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, south base of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Mallikārjunarāyar, son of Sri-Vīra-pratāparāya Dēvarāyar-mahārāyar Śaka 1381, Vikrama, Karkaṭaka, śu. 9, Monday, Pūśam, Irregular.

summary.p: The data given is a puzzle. The Śaka year 138 does not correspond with the cyclic year cited and in the month of Karkaṭaka śu. 9 can never coincide with the asterism Pūśam.

Records the benefaction done by the nāṭṭavar of Veṇpar-nāḍu exempting the village Kaḻanivāśal, the dēvadānam-tirunāmattuk-kāṇi of Tirukkuṟaṅgāḍu-tuṟai-uḍaiyār-kūṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyaṉār of Viṭṭa-paṟṟuugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai Irāśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, from various levies which were due to themselves so that the villagers of that village might pay for the food-offerings during one sandhi daily and for the construction of tirukkōpuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariyarāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappūm muvarāyar kaṇṭan pūrvva dakṣiṇapaści
ma Uttara catusamudrātipati śrīvīrapratāpa tevarāyar mahārāyar kumāran mallīkārjjanarāyar pṛdhuvi Irājyam paṇṇi A
ruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 3 100 8 10 1 ṉmel cellāniṉṟa vikrama varuṣam kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu somavāramum
navamiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ vaṭakarai Irāciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu viṭṭapaṟṟu Ukaḷūr kūṟṟattu tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya nā
yaṉār tevatānam tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāna veṇpar nāṭu kīḻkūṟṟu kaḻanivācalukku veṇparṉāṭu nāṭṭavarom sarvvamānyam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi I
nnāyaṉār tevatānam tirunāmattukkāṇi Āna kaḻani vācalukku nāṭṭukkāṇikkai nāṭṭu viniyokam mantai vari nañcaik kāṇikkai Ucāvaṭi
kkāṇikkai vanniyavari Āyam talaiyārikkam nallerutu koṇikai virimuṭṭu naṟpacu Āḷamañci Aricikāṇam mel varum paḻavari putuvari maṟṟum Eppe
rpaṭṭa pala potiyum Uṭpaṭa Ilakkattukku vaṉṉāṭṭār tanmamāka Uṭaiyār kuṟṟampoṟuttaruḷiya nāyaṉāṟku nāḷtoṟum Oru canti A(m)mutu ceytaruḷavum tirukkopuram ca
maippikka carvvamānyamāka kaḻittu kuṭutta Aḷavukku Immariyāti cantirātittavaraiyum cella kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār kuṟṟampoṟuttaruḷiya ṉāyaṉāṟku veṇpar
nāṭu ṉāṭṭavarom Inta tanmattukku Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil kapilai pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷ Ippaṭikku nāṭṭavar paṇiyā
l nāṭṭukkaṇakku piccanāyan Eḻuttu śubhamastu §
Digital edition of SII 28.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
